title: Shrimp Scampi III
ingredients: ¼ cup extra virgin olive oil
1lb uncooked medium shrimp, peeled, deveined and tails removed
instructions:
In a large skillet sauté the garlic in the butter and olive oil until fragrant. Add the shrimp, lemon juice, and pepper. Cook until the shrimp turns pink.
In a small bowl, combine the oregano, parmesan, bread crumbs and parsley. Sprinkle on top of the shrimp and broil for 2-3 minutes or until the breads crumbs start to brown.
Serve over linguine.
